title: Document glob cache key convention at write site
description: The 'glob:{pattern}' cache key format is explained in a comment inside str_matches_glob (evaluator.rs:389-390) where the key is read. The write site — cache_glob_pattern (lib.rs:331-332) — has no comment explaining the format or the asymmetry with the regex cache, whose keys are the compiled regex string rather than a prefixed original. A reader maintaining the cache encounters the asymmetry without explanation. The write site (cache_glob_pattern) should document the key scheme and why it differs from cache_pattern.
